PROP-baseauction-inv-064.text: Price multiplier intermediate computation must not overflow uint256.
PROP-baseauction-inv-064.assertion: (startMult-endMult)*elapsed does not overflow uint256 for valid param ranges

locations.note: lines 793-795: mulDiv used for (starting-ending)*elapsed/duration — uses solady FixedPointMathLib.mulDiv which reverts on overflow
